name: Raspberry Cordial
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the granulated sugar in a 3-quart glass jar with a lid.
2. Add the raspberries and vodka to the jar; stir gently until combined.
3. Cover the jar securely and place it in a dark, cool location.
4. Each week for about two months, open the jar, stir the contents thoroughly, and replace the cover.
5. After two months, strain the cordial through a very fine sieve into a decanter.
6. The finished cordial will have a vibrant color.
7. It makes approximately 1 1/2 quarts.
